PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "cleared")

PowerShell($body = '{"selections":[{"optionId":"kino","optionTitle":"Кіно","subVariantTitle":"Тиск \(Pressure\)","location":"Дафі","day":"Ср, 10 червня","time":"19:30"}],"customText":"а може просто кава?"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/submit -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){ $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "STATUS $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
